title: Saro´s Construction
description: Adds construction barriers, cones, scaffolding, and interactive site equipment for building realistic construction zones.
body:
![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Construction_Mod/BH_SaroCM_header.webp)

![over](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Construction_Mod/BH_SaroCM_overview.webp)

The Saro's Construction Mod adds a variety of items tailored for creating realistic construction sites in Minecraft. These items include decorative elements and functional construction blocks.

![features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Construction_Mod/BH_SaroCM_features.webp)

- **Decorative Elements** 🎨
  - Various blocks and items designed to enhance your construction site aesthetics.

- **Advanced Construction Equipment** 🛠️
  - **Interactive Wheelbarrow**: Now features **3D item rendering**, **auto-pickup functionality** (works like a hopper!), and **explosion protection**. It functions seamlessly as both a stationary block and a pushable entity.
  - Functional blocks and items with construction-related utilities.

- **Community Feedback** 📢
  - Have a suggestion or found a bug? Reach out to us join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/H8a8CJe) server.

### Blocks
![Construction Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e55e08ecf3e6da305c7ae455acb939499ac07a61.png)

![versions](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Construction_Mod/BH_SaroCM_versions.webp)

### Version Support & Features
**⚠️ Note:** All latest features (such as the updated Wheelbarrow) are currently **only available in version 1.20.1**. 

Port requests are welcome, but please understand that maintaining support for all versions simultaneously is very time-consuming.

- **Forge 1.20.1** ✅ (**Latest Features**)
- **Forge 1.21.1** ✅ (**Latest Features**)
- **Forge 1.21** ✅
- **Forge 1.20.6** ✅
- **Forge 1.20.4** ✅
- **Forge 1.19.4** ✅
- **Forge 1.19.2** ✅
- **Forge 1.18.2** ✅
- **Forge 1.16.5** ✅

![join](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Construction_Mod/BH_SaroCM_community.webp)
Connect with us on [Discord](https://discord.gg/H8a8CJe) and be part of the Saro's Construction Mod community!

**Project Support & Usage**

**Hosting:** For the best performance, I recommend using BisectHosting linked in the banner.

**Modpacks:** You are free to include my work in any modpack. Please ensure proper credit is given by providing a link to this project page.
